description: Range Breakout (RBO) — replaces standard start-time entry with a two-phase market-structure entry. Engine builds a price range, then fires entries on breakout.

fields.label: Enable RangeBreakOut
fields.description: Master toggle. When false, all legs enter via their own Start Time. When true, entry is controlled by RBOManager state machine.

fields.label: Range Monitoring Start Time
fields.description: Time at which IDLE -> MONITORING. Engine begins tracking max(bar.high) and min(bar.low).

fields.label: Range Monitoring End Time
fields.description: Time at which range is frozen and MONITORING -> ENTRY. Changing this auto-syncs entry_start.

fields.label: Entry Start Time
fields.description: Earliest time breakout detection is active. Usually auto-synced to range_monitoring_end.

fields.label: Entry End Time
fields.description: Base deadline for new breakout entries. May be extended by range_buffer until first side fires.

fields.label: Entry At
fields.description: Which legs execute on which breakout direction. Any = all legs on both sides.

fields.label: Range Buffer (mins)
fields.description: Extends entry window beyond entry_end, but only until the first side fires (buffer collapse).

fields.label: Monitoring
fields.description: Data source for range tracking. Only 'Underlying' is supported.

fields.label: Cancel Other Side if One Executes
fields.description: When true, executing one breakout side permanently blocks the other for the rest of the day.
